evals.prompt: Convert /Users/wongjunmun/development/ai-development/jm-design/random-executive-update-micron-dark-executive.html to a high-fidelity PPTX. Save outputs under .agents/skills/html-to-pptx-workspace/iteration-1/default-high-fidelity/.
evals.expected_output: A PPTX with one slide per HTML slide, full-slide image placement, a manifest, validation report, and contact sheet.
expectations: Each PPTX slide contains exactly one full-slide image placed at x=0 and y=0.
The embedded images match the captured browser screenshots with mean pixel delta at or below 1.
The validation report passes and the contact sheet has no blank slides.

evals.prompt: Repeat the same HTML-to-PPTX conversion into .agents/skills/html-to-pptx-workspace/iteration-2/repeatability-check/ and compare the validator result with iteration 1.
evals.expected_output: A second independently generated PPTX with the same slide count, dimensions, and validator pass result.
expectations: The second PPTX contains exactly 18 slides.
The second run passes the same package and pixel validation checks.
The converter manifest records the capture dimensions and scale.
The contact sheet is generated for review.

evals.prompt: Run a third HTML-to-PPTX conversion into .agents/skills/html-to-pptx-workspace/iteration-3/consistency-final/ and verify it remains stable.
evals.expected_output: A third PPTX conversion that validates cleanly and proves the skill is stable across repeated runs.
expectations: The third PPTX contains exactly 18 slides.
All full-slide image placement checks pass.
The final run has no blank or cropped captures in the contact sheet.
